positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial landscape featuring cosmic bioluminescence, floating geometric planets, and interwoven nebula patterns. The primary subject is a majestic, stylized crescent moon emitting soft, gradient light onto a foreground arrangement of stylized floral cosmic blooms and crystalline geometric formations. Composition should be central, with strong contrast between the deep indigo/midnight blue sky and vibrant nebula pinks, aquamarines, and luminous golds. The overall aesthetic should be modern, clean, minimalist sci-fi fantasy, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Emphasize clean silhouettes and graphic impact. High detail, volumetric lighting, UHD, vector art quality.
negative: blur, lowres, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, cluttered, messy, realistic photography, gradients (unless specified), jpeg artifacts
